title: Zero In Honeypot Wasp Trap Bait Refill 3 Pack – Super Effective Non-Toxic Wasp Attractant Sachets – Lasts 2-3 Weeks Per Refill – For Use with Honeypot & Ready-Baited Wasp Traps – Outdoor Garden Use
bullet_points: SUPER EFFECTIVE WASP ATTRACTANT – Highly potent bait formula that wasps find irresistible. Attracts and lures wasps into the trap from a wide radius, ensuring rapid catch rates during peak wasp season.
NON-TOXIC & NON-HAZARDOUS – Safe for use in gardens, patios, bin areas, BBQ zones and outdoor dining spaces. Contains no harmful pesticides or chemicals. Hang traps out of reach of children and pets.

3 REFILL SACHETS – Each pack includes three 4g bait sachets, providing up to 9 weeks of wasp protection. Simply empty sachet contents into the wasp trap, add water and hang in a sunny, sheltered spot.
COMPATIBLE TRAPS – Suitable for refilling the Zero In Honeypot Ready-Baited Wasp Trap and Zero In Ready-Baited Wasp Trap. Keep traps active all summer long with fresh bait for continued protection.

EASY TO USE – Mix one sachet with water and add to trap. Allow approximately 24 hours for bait activation. Top up with water regularly and replace bait when the trap is full. Dispose of contents by burying in garden or placing in household waste.
